headline: Baird Upgrades Cintas (CTAS) on UniFirst Deal Synergy Potential
summary: Cintas Corporation (NASDAQ:CTAS) is included among the 15 Best Safe Dividend Stocks for 2026. On March 11, Baird analyst Andrew Wittmann upgraded Cintas Corporation (NASDAQ:CTAS) to Outperform from Neutral. The firm also raised the stock’s price target to $250 from $225. In late-morning trading that day, the stock was up about 2% to $200.98. The […]
